author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Nintendo Sound Clock: Alarmo 4.0.0 update out now, patch notes

A new version 4.0.0 update for Nintendo Sound Clock: Alarmo is now available. One of the highlights is a new “Random Selection from Favorites” feature. Also, Nintendo says it changed the method for selecting alarm scenes. The full notice about the update is as follows: Nintendo Sound Clock: Alarmo 4.0.0 update out now, patch notes We’ve changed the method for...

The post Nintendo Sound Clock: Alarmo 4.0.0 update out now, patch notes appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Street Fighter 6 announces Random Avatar Matches and Avatar Arcade modes

Two new modes are on the way to Street Fighter 6 – specifically Random Avatar Matches and Avatar Arcade. Both are coming to the game on May 28, 2026. With Random Avatar Matches, players can experience “quick and fair online Avatar Battles”. Avatar Arcade provides “efficient avatar growth”. Here’s some additional information, courtesy of Capcom: Random Avatar Matches Random Avatar...

The post Street Fighter 6 announces Random Avatar Matches and Avatar Arcade modes appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
The Adventures of Elliot: The Millennium Tales releases “Prologue Demo”, new trailer

Ahead of its launch next month, a brand new “Prologue Demo” has just come out for The Adventures of Elliot: The Millennium Tales.  The demo lets players try out the HD-2D action RPG for themselves. Save data can be carried over to the full game. Here’s some additional information about the demo: Carry your save data over to the full...

The post The Adventures of Elliot: The Millennium Tales releases “Prologue Demo”, new trailer appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Nintendo reveals new mobile game Pictonico

Nintendo is releasing a brand new mobile game titled Pictonico, the company just revealed. It will be available on May 28, 2026. Pictonico is a mini-game experience centered around using photos. You can use your own face (or friends as well) across 80 different challenges. It’s already drawing comparisons to Face Raiders on Nintendo 3DS. The game is free to...

The post Nintendo reveals new mobile game Pictonico appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Unreal Engine 5.8 gets new Lumen mode to improve performance on handhelds, should benefit Nintendo Switch 2

Unreal Engine 5 recently released a new preview for its version 5.8 update which could bring about benefits for Nintendo Switch 2 games. The company is prioritizing performance advancements, which has become continually important over the past few months. As part of this, a new Lumen mode has been revealed that targets 60 FPS on all gaming systems, including handhelds....

The post Unreal Engine 5.8 gets new Lumen mode to improve performance on handhelds, should benefit Nintendo Switch 2 appeared first on Nintendo Everything.
